name: Atishay Kasliwal
title: Full Stack Engineer - Atishay Kasliwal
summary: Software Engineer with over 5 years of professional experience, currently pursuing a Master's in Data Science from Stony Brook University (GPA 3.64). Strong background in distributed systems, cloud infrastructure, and AI/ML.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science and Information Technology

highlights: Architected high-availability distributed APIs using Python (FastAPI) and AWS (ECS, Lambda, API Gateway), serving 10K+ daily requests, reducing latency by 83%.
Led CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins, Docker, and AWS, cutting deployment time from 6 hours to 90 seconds.
Implemented monitoring and alerting using CloudWatch and Prometheus, reducing MTTR by 50%.
Authored technical design documents across 10+ distributed systems.
Architected billing, payments, and invoicing integrations using Java, Spring Boot, and AWS (RDS, SQS, SNS, S3), serving 100K+ users.
Designed REST APIs and optimized microservices, reducing P99 latency by 40% and eliminating Sev1 incidents.
Standardized CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins, Docker, Kubernetes, and Terraform — 20+ monthly production releases.
Developed React frontend components integrated with Java Spring Boot microservices, reducing dashboard load time by 35%.
Collaborated across 5+ product teams in Agile/Scrum environments.
Developed billing microservices using Java and Spring Boot on GCP, processing 10K+ transactions generating $50K+ revenue.
Containerized services with Docker; contributed to engineering reviews, reducing rework by 30%.

cloud: AWS (Lambda, API Gateway, SQS, RDS, ECS)

projects.name: Atriveo
